event: Wallet associated with the attack began building a CRV short by borrowing CRV against USDC collateral
reported_metric: 40 million CRV initially reported as borrowed and routed toward OKX

event: Aave contributors described the position as a failed CRV short attempt on Aave
reported_metric: Peak short exposure about 92 million CRV or roughly $60 million

event: Llama and Gauntlet proposed a path to repay excess CRV debt
reported_metric: About $1.6 million bad debt after full liquidation

event: Aave governance proposed freezing multiple low-liquidity V2 markets following the CRV incident
reported_metric: 17 markets listed in the risk proposal

event: Aave ARFC quantified the remaining CRV reserve excess debt for repayment
